name: Grimdark Future
provenance: Community-derived dataset built from OPR (onepagerules.com) Grimdark Future public Battlescribe data. One Page Rules retains all IP rights; use for personal/fan purposes only.

rules.Ambush:
You may choose not to deploy a model with this special rule with your army but instead keep it off the table in reserve.

At the beginning of any round after the first you may place the model anywhere on the table over 9” away from enemy units.

If both players have units with Ambush they must roll-off to see who deploys first, and then alternate in placing them.
rules.Anti-Air: When shooting at enemy Aircraft models firing this weapon don’t count as being an extra 12” away and don’t get the penalty of -1 to hit rolls.
rules.AP(X): Enemy units taking hits from weapons with this special rule get -X to Defense rolls.
rules.Blast(X): Whenever enemy units take hits from a weapon with this special rule they multiply the hits by X.
rules.Deadly(X):
Whenever a model takes wounds from a weapon with this special rule multiply the amount of wounds suffered by X.

Note that wounds suffered by that model don’t carry over to other models if it dies.
rules.Fast: Units with this special rule move 9” when using Advance actions and 18” when using Rush or Charge actions.
rules.Fear: When in melee units with this special rule count as having caused +D3 wounds when determining who won the combat.
rules.Fearless: Units with this special rule get +1 to their morale test rolls.
rules.Flying: Units with this special rule may move through other units and impassable terrain and they may ignore terrain effects.
rules.Furious: Whenever a model with this special rule charges an enemy it gets +1 attack with a weapon of your choice.
rules.Impact(X): Whenever a model with this special rule charges it deals X automatic hits.
rules.Indirect: Weapons with this special rule may shoot at enemies that are not in line of sight and ignore cover from sight obstructions, however they get -1 to hit when shooting after moving.
rules.Poison: Whenever you roll an unmodified to hit result of 6 whilst firing this weapon that hit is multiplied by 3.
rules.Psychic(X):
Models with this special rule may cast one spell at any point during their activation before attacking.

To cast a spell select one from the psychic’s army list, pick a target in line of sight, and roll D6+X. If the result is equal to or higher than the number in brackets then you may resolve the spell’s effects.

Enemy psychics within 18” and line of sight may also roll D6+X at the same time, and if the result is higher than that of the casting psychic, then the spell’s effects are blocked instead.

Note that each psychic may only either try to cast a spell or try to block a spell each round.
rules.Regeneration: Whenever this model takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 5+ the wound is ignored.
rules.Rending: Whenever you roll an unmodified to hit result of 6 whilst using this weapon that hit counts as having AP(4) and it ignores the Regeneration rule.
rules.Scout:
After all other units have been deployed models with scout may be deployed and then moved by up to 12”, ignoring terrain.

If both players have units with Scout they must roll-off to see who goes first, and then alternate in placing them.
rules.Slow: Units with this special rule move 4” when using Advance actions and 8” when using Rush or Charge actions.
rules.Sniper:
Models firing weapons with this special rule count as having Quality 2+ when rolling to hit, and the attacker may pick one model from the target unit as its target.

Note that shooting is resolved as if the target was a unit of 1.
rules.Stealth: Enemies targeting this unit get –1 to hit when shooting at it.
rules.Strider: Units with this special rule treat Difficult Terrain as Open Terrain when moving (may move more than 6”).
rules.Tough(X):
Models with this special rule must accumulate X wounds before being removed as a casualty.

If a model with Tough joins a unit without it then you must remove regular models as casualties before starting to accumulate wounds on the model with Tough.

When a unit with multiple Tough models takes wounds you must accumulate them on the tough model with most wounds until it is killed before starting to accumulate them on another.

Note that heroes must still be assigned wounds last.
rules.Transport(X):
Models with this special rule may transport up to X models in their cargo.

Units may embark by moving into contact with the transport and embarked units may use any action to disembark but only move up to 6”. Units may also be deployed within a transport at the beginning of the game.

If a unit is inside of a Transport when it is destroyed then it must take a Dangerous Terrain test, is immediately Pinned, and surviving models must be placed within 6” of the transport before it is removed.
rules.Hero:
Models with this special rule may be deployed as part of one other friendly unit at the beginning of the game.

When rolling morale tests units may use the hero’s Quality value and when rolling to block use the Defense of the hero’s unit until all non-hero models are killed.
rules.Aircraft:
These models fly far above the battlefield and can’t physically interact with any other models or terrain, nor can they be moved in base contact with.

Non-Aircraft models that shoot at Aircraft count as being an extra 12” away when measuring and get –1 to their to hit rolls.

When an Aircraft is activated it must move a full 18” to 36” in a straight line. If this move brings it off the table edge then its activation ends immediately and it must be placed back on any table edge you choose.
rules.Immobile: Units with this special rule may never move regardless of which action they take and they can’t take Charge actions.
rules.Relentless: Whenever this model rolls an unmodified to hit result of 6 when shooting it may roll 1 extra attack. This rule doesn’t apply to newly generated attacks.

rules.Explosive Head: If this model is ever engaged in melee it is immediately killed and the enemy takes 3 hits for Spores and 9 hits for a Massive Spore. Additionally this model automatically passes all morale tests.
rules.Pheromones: When this unit is activated pick 2 friendly units within 12", which get +1 to their rolls next time they take a morale test.
rules.Shrouding Mist: When this unit is activated pick 2 friendly units within 6”, which get Stealth next time they are shot at.
rules.Spores: If this weapon misses you may place a unit of 3 Spores or 1 Massive Spore 12" away from the target, but the position is decided by your opponent. Note that this new unit can't be activated on the round in which it is placed.
rules.Psychic Synapse: This unit counts as having Psychic(X), where X is the number of models in it. Only one model may cast or block spells each round.
rules.Spawn Grunts: When this unit is activated you may place a unit of 5 Grunts fully within 6".
rules.Surprise Attack: This unit counts as having the Ambush rule and may be deployed up to 3" away from enemy units. Once the unit is deployed roll 4 dice, for each 4+ it deals 3 hits with AP(2) to one enemy unit within 3" (this may target multiple units).
rules.Transport Spore: This unit may transport up to 11 models, or use all of its transport capacity to carry one Carnivo-Rex, Psycho-Rex or Toxico-Rex.
rules.Psychic Barrier: This model may block spells as if it had the Psychic(2) special rule. If it is a Psychic then it gets +1 to spell block rolls.

rules.Shield Wall: Enemy units get -1 to all attack rolls when targeting this unit.
rules.Veteran Walker: This model gets +1 to its attack rolls for melee and shooting.
rules.Large Cargo: This unit may use all of its transport capacity to carry one Attack Walker.
rules.Very Fast: This model moves 12” when using Advance and 24” when using Rush/Charge.
rules.Anti-Psychic: This unit may block spells as if it had the Psychic special rule.
rules.Eternal Vigilant: The hero and his unit get +1 to their melee rolls.
rules.High Prosecutor: The hero and his unit get +1 to their shooting rolls.
rules.Witch Destroyer: The hero and his unit get +1 to their melee and shooting rolls.
rules.Dark Assault: This unit counts as having Ambush and may pick to be deployed on any round.
rules.Grim: This unit counts as having Fearless and whenever it fails a morale test roll one die, on a 4+ it passes instead.
rules.Tactical Master:
When the hero and his unit shoots Pistols, Assault Rifles or Storm Rifles, pick on of the following ammo types, and they get one of these special rules until the end of the round:
- Guided: +1 to hit
- Explosive: Rending
- Flechette: +6" Range
- Incendiary: AP(1)
rules.Aegis: This unit may block spells as if it had the Psychic special rule. If it is a Psychic then it gets +1 to spell block rolls.
rules.Teleport: When this model is activated it may teleport by up to 6" in any direction, ignoring all units and terrain.
rules.Counter: This model gets +1 melee attack with a weapon of your choice when charged.
rules.Repair: Once per turn, if within 2" of a unit with Tough, roll one die. On a 4+ you may repair one wound from the target.
rules.Medical Training: This model and his unit get the Regeneration rule.
rules.Combat Master:
When the hero fights in melee pick one of the following stances:
- Ox: +1 to hit
- Plow: AP(+1)
- Fool: Poison
- Hoof: Impact(1)
rules.Prime: Counts as having Fearless rule, as well as having Regeneration against non-spell attacks (this stacks with Regeneration).

rules.Faith: The hero and her unit get +1 to melee rolls.
rules.War Hymns: The hero and her unit get AP(+1) and +1 attack in melee.
rules.Veteran Infantry: This model gets +1 to its attack rolls for melee and shooting.
rules.Blind Faith:
When the hero and her unit are activated pick one of the following devotions, and they get one of these special rules until the end of the round:
- Passion: +3" when moving
- Guidance: AP(+1) when shooting
- Spirit: AP(+1) when in melee
- Aegis: enemies get -1 to melee hits
rules.Shield Wall: Enemy units get -1 to all attack rolls when targeting this model.
Enemies get -1 to hit when they attack units where all models have this rule.

rules.Dodge: This model has Defense +2 in melee.
rules.EMP: This weapon counts as having Rending but only needs rolls of 5-6 to take effect.
rules.Very Fast: This model moves 12” when using Advance and 24” when using Rush/Charge.

rules.Battle Lore: The hero and his unit get +1 to hit when fighting in melee.
rules.Guild Defender: The hero and his unit get +1 to hit when shooting.
rules.Repair: Once per turn, if within 2” of a unit with Tough, roll one die. On a 2+ you may repair 1 wound from the target.
rules.Slayer: This model gets AP(+2) when fighting units with Tough(3) or higher.
rules.Swift: The hero may ignore the Slow rule.
rules.Shield Wall: Enemies get -1 to hit when they attack units where all models have this rule.
rules.Psychic Spells (Dwarf Guilds):
- Spite Rune (4+): Target enemy unit within 12” gets -1 to hit in melee next time it fights.
- Smiting Rune (4+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 4 automatic hits.
- Battle Rune (5+): Target friendly unit within 12” gets +6” next time it moves.
- Breaking Rune (5+): Target enemy model within 12” takes 2 automatic hits with AP(2).
- Drill Rune (6+): Target piece of terrain within 6” may be moved by up to 6” in any direction or may be removed from play.
- Cleaving Rune (6+): Target 2 enemy units within 12” take 6 automatic hits each.

rules.Very Fast: This model moves 12" when using Advance and 24" when using Rush/Charge.
rules.EMP: This weapon counts as having Rending but only needs rolls of 5-6 to take effect.

rules.Purity Scroll: This model may block spells as if it had the Psychic special rule.
rules.Commander:
When the hero and his unit are activated pick one of the following orders, and they get one of these special rules untilt he end of the round:
- Double Time: +3" when moving
- Take Aim: +1 to shooting rolls
- Focus Fire: AP(+1) when shooting
- Fix Bayonets: +1 to melee rolls
rules.Bird of Prey: When the hero is activated pick one enemy model within 36" and roll one die, on a 4+ it takes 2 hits with AP(1).
rules.Honor Doctrine: If this unit is within 12" of an enemy unit when it is activated then it must charge the closest enemy units and it gets Furious and AP(+1) for this combat.
rules.Tactical Console: When the hero is activated pick on friendly unit within 12", which may immediately move by up to 6".
rules.Field Radio: If this unit has a Commander, then it may give orders to other units that have a Field Radio up to 24" away instead of to his own unit.
rules.Overcharged Engine: When this unit moves you may roll one die, on a 2+ this unit moves +4D3", else it takes 1 automatic wound.

rules.Mutations:
When this unit fights in melee roll one die and apply one bonus:
    1-2: Unit gets AP(+1)
    3-4: Unit gets +1 attack
    5-6: Enemies get -1 to hit
rules.Lust Speed: This unit moves +3” on Advance and +6” on Rush/Charge actions.
rules.Reaper: When in melee you may choose to attack normally or instead only have 1 attack but gain the Deadly(3) special rule. This attack is boosted to Deadly(6) if used by the Greater Lord of Plague.
rules.Undead: Whenever this unit must take a morale test it is passed automatically. Then roll as many dice as remaining models/tough in the unit, and for each result of 1 the unit immediately takes one wound, which can’t be regenerated.
rules.Chosen Veteran: This model gets +1 to its attack rolls for melee and shooting.
rules.Havoc Tactics: The hero and his unit get +3" range when shooting and +3" range when using charge actions.
rules.Repair: Once per turn, if within 2" of a unit with Tough, roll one die. On a 4+ you may repair 1 wound from the target.
rules.War Chant: The hero and his unit get +1 attack in melee when charging.
rules.Frenzy: This model counts as having Furious but gets 2 extra attacks when charging (instead of just 1).
rules.Musical Bliss: Enemy units get -1 to hit in melee when fighting this unit.
rules.Very Fast: This model moves 12" when using Advance and 24" when using Rush/Charge.
rules.Psychic Spells (Disciples of Change):
- Breath of Change (4+): Target friendly unit within 12” may immediately charge by 3”.
- Inferno (4+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 2 automatic hits with AP(2).
- Cursed Mutations (5+): Target enemy unit within 18” gets -1 to hit next time it shoots.
- Fire Storm (5+): Target enemy unit within 12” must take a dangerous terrain test.
- Blessed Mutation (6+): Target friendly unit within 12” gets Regeneration on rolls of 4+ next time it takes wounds.
- Bolt of Change (6+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 1 hit with AP(4) and Deadly(6).
rules.Psychic Spells (Havoc Brothers):
- Dark Sight (4+): Target enemy unit within 12” gets -1 to hit next time it shoots.
- Havoc Terror (4+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 2 automatic hits with AP(2).
- Cursed Sludge (5+): Target enemy unit within 18” moves -6” next time it charges.
- Havoc Trauma (5+): Target enemy model within 12” takes 1 automatic hit with AP(3).
- Warp Passage (6+): Target friendly unit within 12” may immediately move by up to 6”.
- Daemon Fog (6+): Target 2 enemy units within 6” take 8 automatic hits each.
rules.Psychic Spells (Disciples of Plague):
- Blessed Virus (4+): Target friendly unit within 12” gets Stealth next time it’s shot at.
- Muscular Atrophy (4+): Target enemy unit within 6” must take a dangerous terrain test.
- Toxic Blades (5+): Target friendly unit within 12” gets AP(+2) in melee next time it fights.
- Deadly Poison (5+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 1 hit with AP(4) and Deadly(3).
- Poison Wind (6+): Target friendly unit within 12” may immediately move by up to 6”.
- Rot Wave (6+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 4 automatic hits with AP(2).
rules.Psychic Spells (Disciples of Lust):
- Twisted Ecstasy (4+): Target enemy unit within 12” gets -1 to hit next time it shoots.
- Seizure (4+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 1 hit with AP(2) and Deadly(3).
- Pleasure (5+): Target friendly unit within 12” gets Regeneration next time it takes wounds.
- Pain (5+): Target enemy unit within 12” takes 3 automatic hits with AP(2).
- Frenzy (6+): Target friendly unit within 12” may immediately charge by up to 6” and gets +1 to hit for that melee. 
- Overload (6+): Target enemy unit within 6” takes 1 automatic hit per model.

rules.Psychic Council: This unit counts as having Psychic(X), where X is the number of models in it. Only one model in the unit may cast or block spells each round.
rules.Teleport: When this model is activated it may teleport by up to 6" in any direction, ignoring all units and terrain.
rules.Very Fast: This model moves 12" when using Advance and 24" when using Rush/Charge.
rules.Ancient Commander: The hero and his unit may move by up to 3" after shooting.

rules.Commander:
When the hero and his unit are activated pick one of the following orders, and they get one of these special rules until the end of the round:
- Double Time: +3" when moving
- Take Aim: +1 to shooting rolls
- Focus Fire: AP(+1) when shooting
- Fix Bayonets: +1 to melee rolls
rules.Field Radio: If this unit has a Commander, then it may give orders to other units that have a Field Radio up to 24" away instead of to his own unit.
rules.Executioner: Whenever the hero’s unit fails a morale test you must kill one of its models and the morale test counts as passed instead.
rules.Battle Drills: The hero and his unit get the Furious special rule.
rules.Company Standard: This unit gets the Fear and Fearless special rules.
rules.Medical Training: This model and his unit get the Regeneration rule.

rules.Beacon: Friendly units using Ambush may ignore distance restrictions from enemies if they are within 12” of this model.
rules.Shield Wall: Enemies get -1 to hit when they attack units where all models have this rule.

rules.Bloodthirsty: Whenever the hero and his unit fully destroy an enemy in melee they may make another Charge action against an enemy unit within 6”. Note that this special rule can’t be triggered twice in a row.
rules.Boom!: If this model is killed in melee then the attacking unit takes 3 automatic hits.
rules.Infection: Whenever the hero and his unit fight an enemy in melee, place an infection marker next to the target. Enemies with one or more infection markers count as having Quality -1 for the rest of the game, and if they move within 3” of friendly units those units also become infected.
rules.Terrifying: Enemy units fighting the hero in melee get -1 to their morale test rolls.

rules.Radiation: Enemies that roll to block hits from this weapon take one additional wound for each unmodified result of 1 that they roll.
rules.EMP: This weapon counts as having Rending but only needs rolls of 5-6 to take effect.
rules.Taser: For each unmodified result of 6 you roll to hit that hit is multiplied by 4.

rules.Repair Master: Once per turn, if within 2" of a unit with Tough, roll one die. On a 2+ you may repair 1 wound from the target.
rules.Canticles:
When the hero and his unit are activated pick one of the following canticles, and they get one of these special rules until the end of the round:
- Incantation: +3" when moving
- Benediction: AP(+1) when shooting
- Invocation: AP(+1) when in melee
- Psalm: enemies get -1 to melee hits
rules.Radiation: Enemies that roll to block hits from this weapon take one additional wound for each unmodified result of 1 that they roll.
rules.EMP: This weapon counts as having Rending but only needs rolls of 5-6 to take effect.
rules.Taser: For each unmodified result of 6 you roll to hit that hit is multiplied by 4.
rules.Anti-Charge System: Whenever an enemy unit charges this model roll one die per charging model. For each 4+ it takes 1 hit with AP(1).

rules.Mad Doctor: This model and his unit get the Regeneration special rule.
rules.Repair: Once per turn, if within 2" of a unit with Tough, roll one die. On a 4+ you may repair 1 wound from the target.
rules.WAR!: The hero and his unit move +3" on advance and +6" on rush/charge actions.
rules.Teleport: When this model is activated it may teleport by up to 6" in any direction, ignoring all units and terrain.
rules.Energy Field: The hero and his unit get the Stealth special rule.
rules.Red Paint Job: This model moves +3" on Advance and +6" on Rush/Charge actions.
rules.SHOOT!: The hero and his unit get the Relentless special rule.

rules.Lead from Behind: Whenever the hero's unit fails a morale test roll one die. On a 4+ the morale test is passed instead.
rules.Absolute Authority: When the hero is activated pick one friendly unit within 12”. That unit gets the Fast rule until the end of the round.
rules.Safety in Numbers: When the hero is activated pick 2 friendly units within 6”. Those units get +1 to morale tests until the end of the round.
rules.Tangle: When the hero is activated roll one D3 to determine the X value of its Psychic(X) rule.
rules.Piper:
This hero may only join Rat Swarm units.
The hero and his unit get Regeneration.
rules.Piper\u0027s Calling: When the hero is activated pick one friendly unit within 12”. That unit only fails morale tests on 1’s until the end of the round.

rules.Scavenger: Whenever the hero and his unit destroy an enemy unit in melee place a scavenge marker next to them. The unit gets AP(+1) when shooting and fighting in melee for each scavenge marker.
rules.Guerrilla Tactics:
When the hero and his unit are activated pick one of the following tactics, and they get one of these special rules until the end of the round:
- Dash: +3" when moving
- Focus: +1 to shooting rolls
- Exploit: AP(+1) when shooting
- Assault: +1 to melee rolls

rules.Flux: For each unmodified result of 6 you roll to hit that hit is multiplied by 4.
rules.Hunter: On a round in which this unit arrives from Ambush it gets AP(+3).
rules.Repair: Once per turn, if within 2" of a unit with Tough, roll one die. On a 4+ you may repair 1 wound from the target.
rules.Bot Fabricator: When this unit is activated place 1 Bot Swarm fully within 6” of this unit.
rules.Gloom-Protocol: This model may block spells as if it had the Psychic(2) special rule.
rules.Psychic Master: This model counts as having the Psychic(3) rule, and may cast or block up to three spells each round, however for every unmodified result of 1 it takes 3 wounds.
rules.Psychic Warden: Whenever a model within 6” would take wounds from Psychic Master, you may put those wounds on this model instead.
rules.Reanimator: When this unit is activated pick one friendly unit within 12”, which may ignore wounds from Regeneration on 4+ next time it takes wounds.
rules.Royal March: The hero and his unit may ignore the Slow special rule.
rules.Shield Wall: Enemies get -1 to hit when they attack units where all models have this rule.
rules.Royal March Order: When the hero is activated pick one friendly unit within 12”, which may ignore the Slow special rule next time it moves.

rules.Agitator: The hero and his unit get Furious.
rules.Banner: The hero and his unit get the Furious and Regeneration special rules.
rules.Tactical Console: When the hero is activated pick on friendly unit within 12", which may immediately move by up to 6".
rules.Experiments:
When the hero and his unit fight in melee roll one die and apply one bonus:
1-2: Unit gets AP(+1)
3-4: Unit gets +1 attack
5-6: Enemies get -1 to hit
rules.Psychic Idol: The hero gets +1 when rolling to block enemy spells.
rules.Megaphone: The hero and his unit get Fast.

rules.Inspiring: The hero and his unit get the Fearless and Regeneration rules.
rules.Spotting Laser: This model may try to mark an enemy unit instead of firing one of its weapons. Pick one enemy unit within 36" and line of sight and roll one die, on a 4+ it's marked. Friendly units may remove markers from the target to get +X to their shooting rolls against the marked unit, where X is the number of removed markers.
rules.Beacon: Friendly units using Ambush may ignore distance restrictions from enemies if they are withing 6" of this model.
rules.Elemental Power:
When the hero and his unit are activated pick one of these powers, and they get one of these special rules until the end of the round:
- Wind: +3" when moving
- Fire: +1 to shooting rolls
- Water: +3" to shooting range
- Earth: +1 to melee rolls

rules.Veteran Titan: This model gets +1 to its attack rolls for melee and shooting.
rules.Veteran Mini-Titan: This model gets +1 to its attack rolls for melee and shooting.

rules.Banner: The hero and his unit get the Furious and Regeneration special rules.
rules.Bodyguard: Whenever a friendly hero within 6” would take a wound, you may assign that wound to this hero instead.
rules.Exploding Rats: If this model is ever engaged in melee it is immediately killed and the enemy takes 3 hits. Additionally this model automatically passes all morale tests.
rules.Megaphone: The hero and his unit get Fast
rules.Mutagens:
When the hero and his unit fight in melee roll one die and apply one bonus:
• 1-2: Unit gets AP(+1)
• 3-4: Unit gets +1 attack
• 5-6: Enemies get -1 to hit
rules.Repair: Once per turn, if within 2” of a unit with Tough, roll one die. On a 4+ you may repair 1 wound from the target.
rules.Tac-Console: When the hero is activated pick one friendly unit within 12”, which may immediately move by up to 6”.

rules.Symbol of War(X+): When the hero is activated roll one die. On an X+ one enemy unit within 18" takes 3 hits with AP(2).
rules.Resistance(X): Enemy psychics within 12" of this unit get -X their rolls when casting spells.
rules.Symbol of Change(X+): When the hero is activated roll one die. On an X+ one enemy model within 18" takes 1 automatic hit with AP(4) and Deadly(3).
rules.Split: Whenever a Pink Warrior is killed you may replace it with 2 Blue Warriors. Note that you may only start assigning wounds to Blue Warriors once all Pink Warriors are killed.
rules.Split Again: Whenever a Blue Warrior is killed you may replace it with 2 Yellow Warriors. Note that you may only start assigning wounds to Yellow Warriors once all Blue Warriors are killed.
rules.Squish: This model has no Defense value, so every hit causes a wound.
rules.Symbol of Plague(X+): When the hero is activated roll one die. On an X+ one enemy unit within 18" must immediately take a Dangerous Terrain test.
rules.Slime Trap: Enemy units that fight in melee against the hero count as having the Slow special rule for the rest of the game.
rules.Symbol of Lust(X+): When the hero is activated roll one die. On an X+ two enemy units within 18" take 3 automatic hits each.
rules.Very Fast: This model moves 12" when using Advance and 24" when using Rush/Charge.
